_comment: Pletor.ai custom MCP connector for CaillteAI. Copy to repo-root .mcp.json (or merge into it), then fill the real URL + key from docs.pletor.ai/automate/pletor-mcp. Never commit a real key — use ${PLETOR_API_KEY} from your env. Remote MCP server, API-key/bearer auth. Free trial 200 credits, then paid.
